configWindow.title: Settings
configWindow.coverageDescription: Track how many nodes in the viewer already have relationships and how many still need connections while you tune the course load.
configWindow.navigationDescription: Move between the main views from this technical control panel without cluttering the header.
configWindow.language.label: Language
configWindow.dagMode.description: Determines how nodes are positioned based on their hierarchy.
configWindow.dagLevelDistance.description: Sets the spacing between each hierarchical level in the graph(0 - 100).
configWindow.system.description: Select the Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu systems you want to load into the visualization. Each activated system will add its positions and transitions to the main graph.
configWindow.systemNoComplete: There are no fully connected systems available for this account yet.
configWindow.courseBridgeDescription: Open the same course in the system view without losing the graph context.

touch.title: Use touch gestures to navigate the scene
touch.text2: Swipe with two fingers: Pan view
touch.text3: Pinch with two fingers: Zoom in/out

desk.title: Use the mouse to navigate the scene

landing.title: Your BJJ courses, clear and ready to follow
landing.subtitle: Find what you want to study, jump back in where you left off, and keep moving with a simple focused experience.
landing.helper: Log in to unlock all courses, videos, and your progress.
landing.blockedNotice: You need to log in to access {{path}}.
landing.metricRoutesLabel: Ready to follow step by step
landing.visualBody: Open a course, track your progress, and come back without losing context.
landing.featurePersonalizedDescription: You see first what makes the most sense for you to keep studying.
landing.featureContinuityDescription: Return to your last course and instantly spot what you already watched.
landing.featurePrecisionDescription: A focused experience built around technique, sequence, and detail.
landing.featureRoutesDescription: Explore systems and courses through a structure that is easy to understand.
landing.featureTrackingDescription: Spot watched videos quickly and keep moving without guessing.

notFound.title: This route does not exist
notFound.description: The page you tried to open is not available or the address is not valid. You can go back to the start page and continue from there.

home.title: Hi, {{name}}
home.continueTitle: Pick up where you left off
home.progressFallback: You have not watched videos here yet.
home.emptyProgressDescription: Explore a course and your progress will appear here.
home.systemsSubtitle: Courses you may want to study next.

explorer.title: Explore systems
explorer.subtitle: Search the full catalog by technique, coach, or system
explorer.heroTitle: Find courses by system, coach, or technique
explorer.heroDescription: Explore the full catalog from one place with search and filters.
explorer.searchPlaceholder: Ex: guard pass, De La Riva
explorer.idleTitle: Start with a search or filter to explore the catalog
explorer.idleDescription: You can search by technique, coach, or system, filter by category, or show all courses using a specific order.

explorer3d.title: See courses as a non-linear technical map
explorer3d.description: Move through the conceptual graph, spot connections between positions, and switch back to the catalog or home in a single tap.

videoDetail.playbackUnavailableDescription: This node does not have a valid public video source yet.
videoDetail.missingVideoDescription: Open the content from a valid course to keep navigation context.

courseDetail.missingCourseDescription: Return to Explore to open the course from a valid navigation flow.
courseDetail.editorDescription: Edit only the real fields present in the Firestore course document and apply batch tabs across the loaded course videos.
courseDetail.editorSaveError: Course metadata could not be saved.
courseDetail.bulkTagsDescription: Add or remove a real Firestore tab from the {{total}} loaded videos in this course.
courseDetail.bulkTagRequired: Select the tab you want to apply first.
courseDetail.bulkTagAddSuccess: The tab was added to the full course.
courseDetail.bulkTagRemoveSuccess: The tab was removed from the full course.
courseDetail.bulkTagError: Course tabs could not be updated.
courseDetail.graphBridgeReady: This course is fully connected and can be opened in the graph view.
courseDetail.graphBridgeBlocked: This course is not fully connected in the graph yet.

nodeView.title: Video Player
nodeView.subTitle: View and analyze the video content below.
nodeView.brandSubTitle: Define the start and end points for specific video segments.

nodeConnectionViewer.sourceLinksLabel: This node has no outgoing connections.
nodeConnectionViewer.targetLinksLabel: This node has no incoming connections.
nodeConnectionViewer.quickConnectDescription: Create direct links without leaving the video and refresh the graph immediately.
nodeConnectionViewer.selectNodeFirst: Select the node you want to connect first.
nodeConnectionViewer.selectLinkFirst: Select the link you want to edit first.
nodeConnectionViewer.selectReplacementNodeFirst: Select the node that will replace the current connection.
nodeConnectionViewer.linkUpdateUnchanged: That connection already points to the same node.
nodeConnectionViewer.linkCreationError: The connection could not be saved.
nodeConnectionViewer.linkUpdateError: The connection could not be updated.
nodeConnectionViewer.linkDeleteError: The connection could not be deleted.
nodeConnectionViewer.connectedPanelDescription: Jump directly between linked nodes inside this same course.
nodeConnectionViewer.linksEditorDescription: Only the authorized user can modify or delete existing connections. Quick creation of new links stays available.
nodeConnectionViewer.noEditableLinks: This node does not have editable links yet.
nodeConnectionViewer.nodeEditorDescription: Edit the node's main document without leaving the 3D viewer. Fields are saved with merge semantics to avoid overwriting unrelated data.
nodeConnectionViewer.nodeSaveError: Node data could not be saved.
nodeConnectionViewer.nodeNameRequired: Add at least one name for the node.
nodeConnectionViewer.nodeVideoRequired: The node needs a valid video storage key.
nodeConnectionViewer.taxonomyEditorDescription: Update category, subcategory, specific category, and tags from the same viewer editor.
nodeConnectionViewer.taxonomySaveError: Node taxonomy could not be saved.
nodeConnectionViewer.categoryRequiredForSubcategory: Select a category before assigning a subcategory.
nodeConnectionViewer.subcategoryRequiredForSpecificCategory: Select a subcategory before assigning a specific category.
nodeConnectionViewer.tagsEditorDescription: Assign or remove tags while reusing the current taxonomy model.
nodeConnectionViewer.tagsSaveError: Node tags could not be updated.
